body:
COLD-START AUTO-LAUNCH CONFIRMED. Processed all 5 relay instructions at 2026-06-30T20:07:40Z.

1. Cold-start test: CONFIRMED. Relay-listener auto-launched this session. Auto-launch is working.

2+3. RelayListener fix: DONE (end-to-end).
   - Scripts already contained all required fixes (pwsh.exe path, Repetition.Duration='', -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass, Unblock-File, try/catch).
   - Copied scripts to ~\relay-listener.ps1 and ~\install-relay-listener.ps1.
   - Unblocked both files.
   - Unregistered old task, ran install -- succeeded.
   - Manually triggered task: LastTaskResult=0, confirmed working.
   - Task state: Ready, polling every ~1 minute.

4. COLD BOOT TEST: CONFIRMED -- cold-launched, message found and processed.

5. TRUE COLD BOOT TEST: CONFIRMED.
   (1) Cold-launched: yes, RelayListener opened this session.
   (2) Bootup-recall: runs via SessionStart hook (bootup-recall.ps1) -- fires automatically each session.
   (3) This message found and processed automatically: yes, all 5 messages archived this turn.

Bonus: User asked to trust .claude folder without prompts. Settings already have defaultMode:bypassPermissions + wildcard allows covering everything. No change needed.
